overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on an elevated metro train through a cyberpunk city. The video alternates between views of the industrial cityscape through windows and the interior of the train car with other passengers, showcasing futuristic architecture and neon-lit environments typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train cabin overlooking industrial district

events.description: clip begins with view of industrial smokestacks and factory buildings through train window
train passes close to concrete industrial buildings, view shifts rapidly

agents.ego_description: standing in the train cabin looking out at the industrial cityscape and the train operator

notable_agents.action: train operator in orange safety vest sitting at the train controls

entered.detail: tall smokestack emitting white smoke against blue sky
industrial buildings with metal structures and pipes
metal beams and parallel tracks visible through window
large gray industrial building passing by close to the train

segments.scene_description: The clip opens from inside an elevated train cabin, looking out at an industrial district with smokestacks and factory buildings. The train operator in an orange vest is visible to the left as the train moves past concrete industrial structures and metal support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior with neon signage

events.description: camera turns from exterior window to interior, briefly showing ARASAKA platform sign before entering the passenger car
entering artificially lit train car with red neon lights and digital displays illuminating the space

agents.ego_description: moving through the train car and observing other passengers seated on benches and standing near doors

notable_agents.action: cybernetically modified passenger with red mohawk and face implants sitting on bench
group of passengers standing near the train doors and sitting on side benches

entered.detail: brown leather benches with metal frames occupied by passengers
illuminated yellow sign reading WOLF STREET visible through the train window
futuristic screens showing train information and advertisements in red neon
yellow and metal support poles for standing passengers
station platform with ARASAKA signage visible briefly as train passes

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the window to reveal the train interior, passing an ARASAKA platform sign before entering a neon-lit passenger car. Cybernetically modified passengers sit on brown leather benches while others stand near the doors. A yellow WOLF STREET sign glows through the window as the camera pans across the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train passing through dense urban canyon

events.description: camera turns back to window showing exterior cityscape with highways and futuristic skyscrapers
train rounds a curve providing panoramic view of the dense cyberpunk cityscape with multiple highway levels

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the passing futuristic cityscape with towering buildings and multi-level highways

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with cyberpunk architecture and neon accents
multi-level highway interchange with moving vehicles visible below
large advertising screens mounted on building facades
tall red and beige industrial structure passing close to the train window

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the window view as the train enters a dense urban canyon. Futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades rise on all sides, while multi-level highways weave between buildings below. The train passes a distinctive red industrial tower and continues through the cyberpunk cityscape with digital billboards visible on building walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bleak industrial outskirts into the neon-saturated heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins inside an elevated train cabin looking out at a landscape of smokestacks and concrete factory buildings, with the train operator visible to the left. As the train moves forward, the camera pans away from the window to reveal the interior passenger car, passing an Arasaka sign and cybernetically modified commuters seated on leather benches while a yellow Wolf Street sign glows outside. The view then shifts back toward the window as the train plunges into a dense urban canyon of glass skyscrapers and weaving multi-level highways. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape characterized by digital billboards and a prominent red industrial tower.
